requirement.description: The BCM shall transmit the interior light level (in percentage) on the CAN bus.
requirement.python_test_setup:
import os
import time
import pytest
import can

BCM_CAN_ID = 0x100
MONITOR_DURATION = 1.0
MIN_EXPECTED_FRAMES = 2

@pytest.fixture(scope="session")
def can_bus():
    bus = can.interface.Bus(
        interface=os.getenv("CAN_INTERFACE", "socketcan"),
        channel=os.getenv("CAN_CHANNEL", "can0"),
        bitrate=int(os.getenv("CAN_BITRATE", "500000"))
    )
    yield bus
    bus.shutdown()

def collect_bcm_messages(bus, duration_sec):
    end_time = time.time() + duration_sec
    frames = []
    while time.time() < end_time:
        msg = bus.recv(timeout=0.05)
        if msg and msg.arbitration_id == BCM_CAN_ID: frames.append(msg)
    return frames

def get_light_level(data):
    return data[1] & 0xFF

def assert_frames_present(msgs):
    assert len(msgs) >= MIN_EXPECTED_FRAMES, "No periodic frames observed"

test_cases.title: Light OFF (0%) Verification
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; light set to OFF
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_il_001_light_off(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_bcm_messages(can_bus, MONITOR_DURATION)
    assert_frames_present(msgs)
    assert all(get_light_level(m.data) == 0 for m in msgs)

test_cases.title: 25% Brightness Verification
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_il_002_light_25(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_bcm_messages(can_bus, MONITOR_DURATION)
    assert_frames_present(msgs)
    assert all(get_light_level(m.data) == 25 for m in msgs)

test_cases.title: 50% Brightness Verification
75% Brightness Verification
100% Brightness Verification
Robustness: Negative Value Clamp
Robustness: Over-limit Clamp
Signal Stability Verification
test_cases.expected_result: All received frames contain value 60 with no fluctuations
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_il_008_stability(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_bcm_messages(can_bus, MONITOR_DURATION)
    values = [get_light_level(m.data) for m in msgs]
    assert len(set(values)) == 1

test_cases.title: Periodic Transmission Verification
test_cases.expected_result: Multiple frames are received within window

test_cases.title: Dynamic Update Verification
test_cases.expected_result: Signal changes from 20 to 80 within next transmitted frames
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_il_010_dynamic_update(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_bcm_messages(can_bus, MONITOR_DURATION)
    values = [get_light_level(m.data) for m in msgs]
    assert 20 in values and 80 in values
    assert values.index(80) > values.index(20)
